narrative:
Clearcreek Twp I (precinct in Warren County) has 867 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.5 percentage points.
